acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Current local HEAD and remote bos/issue-51 ref equal the reviewed exact commit
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: git rev-parse HEAD, refs/remotes/origin/bos/issue-51, and live git ls-remote refs/heads/bos/issue-51 all returned 40750c297ed42435dabe1d4670bfda85ce92af36; git status --porcelain was empty both before and after validation.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Current architecture, security, functional, and quality diff is independently inspectable
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Inspected the complete 311-line patch from base 8c2ec23a4a7873890a81562a1e701efae684be34 through exact HEAD. Capacity wait reconciliation refreshes before dispatch, releases provider and local reservations for missing/terminal/unroutable waiters, preserves local fencing on provider release failure, drops only stale local state for foreign ownership, and heartbeats valid owned waiters without mutating Attempt/retry metadata.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Full Elixir gate passes with 100 percent coverage, Credo and Dialyzer
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Fresh repair-cycle run: 363 tests, 0 failures, 2 skipped; 100.00% coverage; specs check and strict Credo found no issues; Dialyzer reported 0 errors; formatting and diff hygiene passed.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Visual evidence is required for this patch
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: The reviewed patch changes backend orchestration, game-api adapter/client behavior, automated tests, and documentation only; it does not modify UI, rendered assets, templates, styles, or visual behavior.

checks.command: git status --porcelain=v1; git rev-parse HEAD; git rev-parse refs/remotes/origin/bos/issue-51; git ls-remote --heads origin refs/heads/bos/issue-51
checks.summary: Clean tree and all local/tracking/live remote identities equal 40750c297ed42435dabe1d4670bfda85ce92af36.

checks.command: git diff --stat; git diff --check; git diff --unified=35 8c2ec23a4a7873890a81562a1e701efae684be34...HEAD
checks.summary: Complete 8-file, 311-line issue patch inspected; no whitespace or correctness defect found.

checks.command: cd elixir && mise exec -- mix test
cd elixir && mise exec -- mix test --cover
cd elixir && mise exec -- mix lint
checks.summary: Specs check and strict Credo pass with no findings.

checks.command: cd elixir && mise exec -- mix dialyzer
cd elixir && mise exec -- mix format --check-formatted

residualRisk.risk: Exact merged-artifact installation and service-health verification remain post-merge delivery responsibilities.
residualRisk.mitigation: DeploymentVerification must bind installation and health probes to the exact merged commit; this pre-merge repair cycle does not request merge or approval.

summary: Repair cycle 1 independently re-confirmed the clean exact HEAD and live remote branch, inspected the complete issue diff, found no valid source correction, and reran the complete repository validation successfully.
